title: teucrium scordium var. serratum
intro: Teucrium scordium var. serratum, also known as Wood Germander, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Wood Germander is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
